Bahamas

The BAHAMAS Project — A suite of cosmological hydrodynamical simulations designed to test the impact of baryonic physics on the interpretation of large-scale structure tests of cosmology.

The GADGET Code — A freely available code for cosmological N-body/SPH simulations.
